message.content:
{
  "units": [
    {
      "declaration_names": [
        "fromPartition",
        "toNPartition",
        "bijection_partition_NPartition"
      ],
      "lean_file_body": "open Finset

/-- Given a partition `p` of `n` with length ≤ N, produce an N-partition by padding with zeros. -/
def fromPartition {n N : ℕ} (p : Nat.Partition n) (h : Multiset.card p.parts ≤ N) : NPartition N where
  parts i := 
    if hi : (i : ℕ) < Multiset.card p.parts then 
      (Multiset.sort (· ≥ ·) p.parts).get ⟨i, hi⟩
    else 0
  antitone := by
    intro i j hij
    dsimp
    split_ifs with hi hj
    · have hcard : (i : ℕ) ≤ (j : ℕ) := hij
      have hpos : (Multiset.sort (· ≥ ·) p.parts).Sorted (· ≥ ·) := by
        apply Multiset.sort_sorted (· ≥ ·) (fun a b => by decide)
      have := hpos.rel_of_lt (by exact_mod_cast hcard) (by exact_mod_cast hi) (by exact_mod_cast hj)
      exact this
    · exact Nat.zero_le _
    · exact Nat.zero_le _
    · rfl

/-- Given an N-partition, produce a partition by dropping trailing zeros. -/
def toNPartition {N : ℕ} (μ : NPartition N) : Σ n : ℕ, Nat.Partition n := by
  let partsList := (Finset.filter (λ i => μ.parts i ≠ 0) Finset.univ).val.map μ.parts
  refine ⟨partsList.sum, ⟨partsList, ?_, ?_⟩⟩
  · intro i hi
    have : i ∈ partsList := hi
    rcases Multiset.mem_map.mp this with ⟨j, hj, rfl⟩
    have hpos : μ.parts j ≠ 0 := by
      simpa using hj
    exact Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hpos
  · rfl

/-- The bijection between partitions of length ≤ N and N-partitions. -/
theorem bijection_partition_NPartition {n N : ℕ} :
    Function.Bijective (λ (p : Σ' (p : Nat.Partition n), Multiset.card p.parts ≤ N) => fromPartition p.1 p.2) := by
  sorry",
      "notes": [
        "The `fromPartition` definition uses `Multiset.sort` to get an ordered list of parts; this may not match the intended ordering of the source text (weakly decreasing tuple). The `toNPartition` returns a sigma type because `Nat.Partition` is indexed by the sum; the bijection statement is incomplete and uses `sorry` because the proof is not provided. The `Function.Bijective` type may not be exactly what the source intends; the source says 'bijection' between sets, which could be formalized as an equivalence. The `Multiset.card` is used for length; there is no `Nat.Partition.length` in Mathlib. The `antitone` proof is sketched but may need more work. The `toNPartition` does not guarantee the length condition. Overall, this is a partial attempt and cannot be considered a complete formalization."
      ],
      "status": "cannot_prove_from_visible_context",
      "unit_key": "unit-001",
      "used_context": [
        "NPartition structure with parts and antitone",
        "Nat.Partition structure with parts, parts_pos, parts_sum",
        "Multiset.card for length",
        "Multiset.sort for ordering",
        "Finset.univ for Fin N"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
